source.name: AstroGuide bundled comet seed and ephemeris snapshot
source.notes: Wraps the bundled comet_seeds.json and comet_ephemeris.json files in the dynamic metadata package envelope without changing their runtime shape.

comets.shortDescription: A newly discovered PANSTARRS visitor and one of the strongest comet targets in the current active list.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this build is about magnitude 8.2, spanning roughly 7.0 to 21.3 across the bundled 2026 ephemeris.

comets.shortDescription: A northern-sky comet discovered by Kacper Wierzchos and a worthwhile challenge when conditions line up.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this build is about magnitude 14.4, spanning roughly 11.1 to 17.9 across the bundled 2026 ephemeris.

comets.shortDescription: A classic periodic comet and one of the best-studied Jupiter-family returns in the sky.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this build is about magnitude 16.3, spanning roughly 13.4 to 18.7 across the bundled 2026 ephemeris.

comets.shortDescription: A faint Machholz-family periodic comet that is better treated as a specialist target than a casual one.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this build is about magnitude 20.8, spanning roughly 20.7 to 24.2 across the bundled 2026 ephemeris.

comets.shortDescription: A long-period active-list comet with dramatic modeled brightness swings as it dives through the inner system.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this build is about magnitude 10.9, spanning roughly -9.7 to 27.3 across the bundled 2026 ephemeris. Near-Sun estimates should be treated cautiously.

comets.shortDescription: A well-known periodic comet that can become a rewarding small-aperture target near the right return.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this build is about magnitude 14.8, spanning roughly 14.7 to 18.3 across the bundled 2026 ephemeris.

comets.shortDescription: A periodic comet that tends to stay faint, but still makes a satisfying imaging target under dark skies.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this build is about magnitude 15.8, spanning roughly 15.2 to 16.7 across the bundled 2026 ephemeris.

comets.shortDescription: A long-period Lemmon survey comet with a wide brightness range across this year's bundled track.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this build is about magnitude 16.5, spanning roughly 13.0 to 21.8 across the bundled 2026 ephemeris.

comets.shortDescription: A modest periodic comet from the LINEAR program, best treated as a faint specialist target.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this build is about magnitude 15.2, spanning roughly 15.0 to 22.4 across the bundled 2026 ephemeris.

comets.shortDescription: A recurring Jupiter-family comet that rarely gets bright, but remains a solid challenge object for comet hunters.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this build is about magnitude 17.1, spanning roughly 16.7 to 20.3 across the bundled 2026 ephemeris.
